task_description: Fix the chatbot smoke test response quality issues: the LLM echoes raw PDF metadata (Document ID, Authors, Conference, DOI, etc.) instead of generating natural language responses. Fix involves aggressive metadata stripping from context sent to LLM, robust post-processing of LLM output, improved off-topic detection, and better error handling.

verification.summary: All 55 tests pass (17 existing + 38 chatbot unit tests). Review issues addressed: context cleaner regex tightened to preserve colon-containing narratives, bullet-stripping limited to metadata-like lines, retry timeout budget documented and shortened.
